title: Anjumoorthy Temple
tagline: Anjumoorthy Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Anjumoorthy Temple is a Hindu temple at Anjumoorthy neighbourhood in Palakkad district, Kerala in India.
overview.description: Anjumoorthy Temple is a Hindu temple at Anjumoorthy neighbourhood in Palakkad district, Kerala in India. It is one of the 108 Shiva Temples in India.

topPlaces.name: Marottichal
topPlaces.description: Marottichal Waterfalls is a popular tourist attraction located in Puthoor Panchayat in Thrissur district of Kerala. Marottichal is about 20 km away from Thrissur town.

topPlaces.name: Edathara
topPlaces.description: Edathara is a village in Parli Panchayat, Palakkad district, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Pattambi Taluk
topPlaces.description: Pattambi is a taluk at the western end of the Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. The town of Pattambi is the administrative headquarters of the taluk.

topPlaces.name: Parli-I
topPlaces.description: Parli-I is a village in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. Parli-I and Parli-II come under the administration of the Parli gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kottayi-II
topPlaces.description: Kottayi-II is a village in the Palakkad district, state of Kerala, India. Kottayi-II and Kottayi-I come under the Kottayi gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Pallanchathanur
topPlaces.description: Pallanchathanur is a small village in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. This small Village is part of Kuzhalmannam Block in Palakkad District.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Anjumoorthy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Anjumoorthy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Anjumoorthy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (58 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Anjumoorthy Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Anjumoorthy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Anjumoorthy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Anjumoorthy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Anjumoorthy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Marottichal, Edathara, Pattambi Taluk, Parli-I, Parli-II.
